description: Explicitly promoted tools from chrome-devtools-mcp for the gemini-cli browser agent.

exclude.name: lighthouse
exclude.reason: 3.5 MB pre-built bundle — not needed for gemini-cli browser agent's core tasks.

exclude.name: performance
exclude.reason: Depends on chrome-devtools-frontend TraceEngine (~800 KB) — not needed for core tasks.

exclude.name: screencast
exclude.reason: Requires ffmpeg at runtime — not a common browser agent use case and adds external dependency.

exclude.name: extensions
exclude.reason: Extension management not relevant for the gemini-cli browser agent's current scope.
